description: Composition Charcoal formal trousers made of 100% polyester, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two buttoned welt pockets at the back with a metal zip and button closure Fit Regular Wash care Hand/machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Drip dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Classy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These formal trousers from indigo nation will go a long way in making you the best dressed man in the room. Made from the choicest of fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear or any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
